fields.playerNameHelper: Used to identify you the first time and save your `PrimaryId` automatically.

fields.sessionGapHelper: Minutes between matches to consider them the same session (5-120, default 30).

notFound.title: Not found
notFound.message: Rocket League was not detected. Make sure it is installed.

ini.title: Configure Stats API
ini.description: Automatically activates the Rocket League stats API by editing the game's configuration file.

errors.noRlPath: First configure the Rocket League path in Settings.

applied.title: Configuration applied
applied.message: The RL file has been configured on port {{port}}.

error.message: Could not configure the RL file.

data.title: Storage
data.deleteModalDescription: This action cannot be undone. All matches and statistics will be deleted.
data.deleteModalWarning: Make sure you've exported your data if you want to keep it.

update.title: Updates
update.commonCauses: Common causes: no GitHub release published, running in development mode, or the latest.json file is missing from the release.

errors.invalidSignature: Invalid signature. Verify that TAURI_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY is configured in CI.
errors.updateNotFound: Update file not found. The latest.json was probably not generated correctly.
errors.connection: Connection error. Check your internet access.
errors.signatureMismatch: Signature error. The public key in tauri.conf.json may not match.
errors.latestJsonNotFound: latest.json not found. Make sure the CI release has been run.

Connection error. Check your internet access.
